name: Retail Performance Attributes
privacy_notes: deliveryDetails.contact.name and deliveryDetails.contact.phone are personal contact data — do not index or expose in discovery responses
agent.name and agent.phone are personal data belonging to the delivery agent — transmit only to the relevant buyer
deliveryOtp and selfPickupCode are single-use secrets — never log or cache
proofOfDelivery URI may contain photographic evidence of the buyer's premises
